brand_dna.category: Montreal-based specialty coffee company selling single-origin and blend roasts online and by subscription.
brand_dna.core_belief: Coffee is a moment to escape - a chance to free yourself from the routine of everyday life to achieve something greater.
proof_points: Single-origin sourcing with named farms, producers, regions and altitudes (e.g. La Palmera, Mercedes Carranza Montenegro, Peru, 1500m)
Coffees chosen for quality, taste, social impact, transport, origin and treatment of employees
Packed only with compostable or reusable packaging and delivered by the most ecological transport possible
Roasts organized into intentional profiles - Limited, Bright, Warm and Dark Series - with brew ratios published per coffee
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, personality-forward specialty roaster - playful and adventurous where most craft coffee is precious and technical.

voice_pillars.name: Adventurous Escapist
voice_pillars.desc: Writes coffee as a mini-getaway, inviting the reader to feel and imagine rather than just drink.
voice_pillars.quote: Surrender to the moment with each sip and every cup of our wide and varied specialty coffee selection.

voice_pillars.name: Playfully Obsessive
voice_pillars.desc: Owns its one-track coffee fixation with cheeky, self-aware humor.
voice_pillars.quote: We've been accused of having a one-track mind. And to those accusations we say - thank you.

voice_pillars.name: Warm And Inviting
voice_pillars.desc: Uses cozy, human language that makes even a rare coffee feel comforting and accessible.
voice_pillars.quote: A comfortable cup that will inevitably feel like a warm hug.

voice_pillars.name: Values-Led
voice_pillars.desc: States its ethics plainly, putting planet and people ahead of profit without preachiness.
voice_pillars.quote: We build Escape by putting the planet, people and quality before profit.

phrases: an escape is possible. Just grab a bag, and jump right in
it will change the way you see life
transports you to the places you've only dreamed of visiting
every coffee has to be epic

icp: Curious coffee lovers who want distinctive single-origin cups with a story and ethics behind them, and who treat their daily brew as a small ritual to escape the routine.

personas.name: The Flavour Explorer
personas.description: Adventurous home brewer chasing rare varieties and vivid tasting notes - moved by origin stories, unique processes and 'it will change the way you see life' novelty.

personas.name: The Conscious Sipper
personas.description: Values-driven buyer who cares about ecological transport, compostable packaging and fair treatment of producers - moved by 'planet, people and quality before profit'.

personas.name: The Ritual Seeker
personas.description: Everyday coffee drinker who wants their cup to be a comforting daily escape - moved by warmth, ease and 'just grab a bag and jump right in' simplicity.

offers: Free shipping: Quebec & Montreal orders 35$+, Canada orders 55$+ (USA temporarily suspended)
Subscribe to monthly deliveries and save up to 15% on every order
Gift cards and gift boxes available
15-day return policy on eligible items (perishables such as coffee are exempt; contact hello@escape.cafe for coffee dissatisfaction)
Local bike delivery with published cut-off times

allowed.claim: Single-origin coffee from named farms and regions (e.g. Peru, Amazonas, La Palmera).
Packed only with compostable or reusable packaging.
Delivered by the most ecological means of transport possible.
Save up to 15% on every order with a monthly subscription.
Free shipping on Quebec & Montreal orders 35$+ and Canada orders 55$+.
Coffees selected considering quality, taste, social impact, transport and origin.

banned.claim: Coffee that boosts immunity or supports your immune system.
banned.why: Banned immunity claim - unqualified health benefit not supported on label.
Unqualified 'detox' claim is banned for this category.

banned.claim: Burns fat or aids weight loss.
Treats, prevents or cures any condition (e.g. fatigue, migraines).

banned.why: 'Natural' and 'clean' are vague, risky headline claims - use specific process terms like 'washed' or 'natural process' instead.

banned.claim: Nutrient content claims like 'low sugar' or 'antioxidant-rich'.
banned.why: Nutrient-content claims must match the actual label; none is stated on-site.
